rationale: The cited paper appears as a single parenthetical reference in the results discussion, where the authors suggest their retailer's emails may have an advertising effect rather than an immediate promotional effect. It is used as an illustrative prior example, not as a basis for the paper's conceptual framing, hypotheses, model specification, or estimation approach. The citing paper's core contribution (joint opt-in/opt-out and spending model via vine copulas and hazard components) does not build directly on this specific cited work.
